parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT json_agg(cga ORDER BY priority_score DESC) FROM (
    SELECT project_name, target_keyword, our_position, priority_score, topics_missing
    FROM content_gap_analysis
    WHERE status = 'pending'
    ORDER BY priority_score DESC
    LIMIT 5
  ) cga) AS top_content_gaps,

  (SELECT json_agg(so ORDER BY identified_at DESC) FROM (
    SELECT project_name, keyword, current_pos, pos_90_days_ago
    FROM (
      SELECT
        c.project_name,
        c.keyword,
        c.current_position AS current_pos,
        o.current_position AS pos_90_days_ago
      FROM keyword_rankings c
      JOIN keyword_rankings o ON c.project_name=o.project_name AND c.keyword=o.keyword
        AND o.recorded_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE-97 AND CURRENT_DATE-83
      WHERE c.recorded_date >= CURRENT_DATE-7
        AND (o.current_position - c.current_position) >= 5
      ORDER BY (o.current_position - c.current_position) DESC
      LIMIT 3
    ) decay_sub
  ) so) AS decaying_pages,

  (SELECT json_agg(kr ORDER BY search_volume DESC) FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (project_name, keyword)
      project_name, keyword, current_position, search_volume, url_ranking
    FROM keyword_rankings
    WHERE current_position BETWEEN 6 AND 10
      AND recorded_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7
    ORDER BY project_name, keyword, recorded_date DESC
    LIMIT 5
  ) kr) AS quick_win_rankings,

  (SELECT json_agg(op ORDER BY identified_at DESC) FROM (
    SELECT project_name, opportunity_type, description, estimated_impact
    FROM seo_opportunities
    WHERE status = 'open'
    ORDER BY identified_at DESC
    LIMIT 5
  ) op) AS open_opportunities;
